expectations.text: Response includes a numbered plan or step list before showing code changes
expectations.evidence: Has a '## Plan' section with 3 numbered steps, each with a '→ verify:' check, before any proposed code

expectations.text: All SQL queries in the proposed code use %s or ? placeholders instead of string formatting
expectations.evidence: All 6 functions use %s placeholders with tuple parameters passed to cursor.execute()

expectations.text: Response does NOT rename functions, add docstrings, restructure the module, or add error handling beyond what is needed for parameterization
expectations.evidence: No function renames, no docstrings added, no restructuring. Only added _UPDATABLE_FIELDS allowlist (directly needed for column-name safety) and ValueError for unknown fields (part of the SQL injection fix).

expectations.text: All 6 functions in db.py have their queries converted to parameterized form
expectations.evidence: get_user, get_users_by_role, search_users, insert_user, update_user, delete_user — all 6 converted
